summary: Ukrainian forces have begun deploying fixed-wing UAVs carrying two FPV drones each, prompting Russian mobile fire groups and air observation posts to adopt drone detectors, neutralization tools, shotguns, and Antidronin capsules for AK rifles. Russian operators from the Rubicon Center report intercepting over 1,500 Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs, with more than 75% belonging to 11 specific models, and destroying 107 targets in operations across Donbas, Sumy, and Krasny Liman. Russian forces also released footage of FAB-3000 bomb strikes with UMPK on Ukrainian positions in Krasny Liman, captured via optical fiber FPV drone. Additionally, Russian milbloggers expressed concern over Ukrainian innovations, citing past instances where Ukrainian tactics were quickly adopted and scaled by Russian forces.
